Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.ui.model.list

Class AbstractMeanObservationTableModel

java.lang.Object
javax.swing.table.AbstractTableModel
org.aavso.tools.vstar.ui.model.list.AbstractSyntheticObservationTableModel
org.aavso.tools.vstar.ui.model.list.AbstractMeanObservationTableModel
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, TableModel, Listener<BinningResult>
Direct Known Subclasses:
PhasePlotMeanObservationTableModel, RawDataMeanObservationTableModel
public abstract class AbstractMeanObservationTableModel extends AbstractSyntheticObservationTableModel implements Listener<BinningResult>
This class is a base table model for derived mean observation data. The model is notified of wholesale mean data change.

    • AbstractMeanObservationTableModel

      public AbstractMeanObservationTableModel(List<ValidObservation> meanObsData)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      obs - The mean initial observation data. The mean data can be updated later via this class's listener interface.

    • update

      public void update(BinningResult binningResult)
